context: Tests whether the agent lists ADRs from a non-default directory resolved via ADR_DIR, correctly reads each record's status, distinguishes in-force from retired decisions, and excludes non-ADR files.

checklist.name: Uses pantheon-adr list against the configured directory
checklist.description: Runs `pantheon-adr list` honouring ADR_DIR (or passes --dir architecture/decisions) rather than reading files manually.

checklist.name: Reads status per record
checklist.description: Reports the Status of each ADR, including that ADR-0002 is Superseded by ADR-0004.

checklist.name: Groups in force vs retired
checklist.description: Summary separates in-force records (0001, 0003, 0004) from the retired one (0002).

checklist.name: Excludes non-ADR files
checklist.description: Notes that README.md is not an ADR and is excluded from the listing.

checklist.name: Records identified by number and title
checklist.description: Each record in the summary is named by its number and title.
